paper_title: Okapi: Instruction-tuned Large Language Models in Multiple Languages with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
evaluation_method: ChatGPT-translated HellaSwag into 26 languages. Same evaluation as standard HellaSwag: given a context, select the most plausible continuation from 4 choices. In lm-eval-harness: output_type=multiple_choice, log-likelihood comparison with length normalization (acc_norm). Zero-shot evaluation.
